title: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Mesh back office chair with lumbar support and adjustable armrests. Suitable for 8+ hour workdays.

title: Wireless Keyboard and Mouse Combo
description: Quiet keys, ergonomic mouse. Bluetooth 5.0, long battery life.

title: 24" LED Monitor
description: Full HD 1920x1080, IPS panel, slim bezel. VESA mount compatible.

title: Standing Desk Converter
description: Sit-stand converter, fits most desks. Sturdy steel frame, two-tier keyboard tray.

title: USB-C Hub 7-in-1
description: HDMI, USB 3.0, SD card reader, PD charging. Aluminum body.

title: Desk Lamp with USB Port
description: LED adjustable lamp, dimmable, USB-A port for charging. Clamp or base mount.

title: Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Over-ear Bluetooth headphones. 30hr battery, foldable, carrying case included.

title: Laptop Stand Aluminum
description: Ventilated aluminum stand, adjustable height. Reduces neck strain.

title: Webcam 1080p
description: Built-in microphone, auto light correction. Clip-on design for monitors.

title: Cable Management Box
description: Fabric-covered box for power strip and cables. Keeps desk tidy.

title: Mechanical Keyboard
description: Cherry MX-style switches, RGB backlight. Full size with numpad.

title: Monitor Arm Single
description: Gas spring monitor arm, VESA 75/100. Cable management included.

title: Desk Mat Extended
description: Large desk pad with stitched edges. Protects desk and reduces noise.

title: Portable SSD 1TB
description: USB 3.2 Gen 2, compact. Shock resistant, 3-year warranty.

title: Foot Rest Under Desk
description: Ergonomic angled foot rest. Improves posture and circulation.

title: Document Camera
description: 1080p document camera for presentations and scanning. USB plug-and-play.

title: Whiteboard Small
description: Magnetic dry-erase board with markers and eraser. Wall mount or desktop.

title: USB Microphone
description: Cardioid condenser mic for calls and recording. Includes desk stand.
